zh.lifeSummary: 當John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire於1419年5月3日出生在英國爾斯托普特時，他的父親Sir Robert de Davenport21歲，母親Agnes Alice Fitton22歲。他於1435年1月22日與Cicely de Warren在英國英格蘭爾波易頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1478年10月13日在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire于1419年5月3日出生在英国爾斯托普特时，他的父亲Sir Robert de Davenport21岁，母亲Agnes Alice Fitton22岁。他于1435年1月22日与Cicely de Warren在英国英格兰爾波易頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1478年10月13日在他的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire was born on 3 May 1419, in Stockport, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Robert de Davenport, was 21 and his mother, Agnes Alice Fitton, was 22. He married Cicely de Warren on 22 January 1435, in Poynton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 13 October 1478, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in England.

fr.Pendergast, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Prendergast, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire est né le 3 mai 1419, à Stockport, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Davenport, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Agnes Alice Fitton, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Cicely de Warren le 22 janvier 1435, à Poynton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 13 octobre 1478, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire am 3. Mai 1419 in Stockport, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert de Davenport 21 und seine Mutter Agnes Alice Fitton 22. Er hat am 22. Januar 1435 in Poynton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Cicely de Warren geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Oktober 1478 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in England begraben.

ht.Pendergast, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Prendergast, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire è nato il il 3 maggio 1419 nel Stockport, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert de Davenport, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Alice Fitton, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Cicely de Warren il 22 gennaio 1435, nel Poynton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 13 ottobre 1478, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquireが1419年5月3日にイギリスチェシュアイアストクプオルトで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Davenportは21歳，母Agnes Alice Fittonは22歳であった。1435年1月22日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアポイントンでCicely de Warrenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1478年10月13日に故郷で59歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire(이)가 1419년 5월 3일 영국 체실르 스톡포트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Davenport(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Alice Fitton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1435년 1월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 포이턴에서 Cicely de Warren(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1478년 10월 13일 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.3 May 1419–13 October 1478: 3 de maio de 1419–13 de outubro de 1478
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire nasceu em 3 de maio de 1419, em Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert de Davenport, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Alice Fitton, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Cicely de Warren em 22 de janeiro de 1435, em Poynton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de outubro de 1478, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ro.Pendergast, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Prendergast, Pembrokeshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire родился 3 мая 1419 г. в местности стоккпорт, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Davenport было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Alice Fitton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Cicely de Warren 22 января 1435 г. в местности поинтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 13 октября 1478 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.3 May 1419–13 October 1478: 3 de mayo de 1419–13 de octubre de 1478
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire nació el 3 de mayo de 1419, en Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert de Davenport, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Agnes Alice Fitton, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Cicely de Warren el 22 de enero de 1435, en Poynton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 13 de octubre de 1478, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
